@graph.name: Nodalite
@graph.description: Runtime-agnostic TypeScript API framework — runs on Node.js, Bun, Deno, Cloudflare Workers, and AWS Lambda.

offers.description: Free and open source under MIT License

mainEntity.name: Why use Fetch API instead of Express-style req/res?

acceptedAnswer.text: The standard Request/Response API is implemented natively by Node 18+, Bun, Deno, and Cloudflare Workers. Building on it means the same code runs everywhere without adaptation layers.

Nodalite provides built-in security middleware (CORS, rate limiting, JWT auth, CSRF, SSRF protection), OpenTelemetry observability, and runs on every major JavaScript runtime. It is designed for production use.

mainEntity.name: How does Nodalite compare to Express, Fastify, and Hono?

acceptedAnswer.text: Unlike Express and Fastify which are Node-only, Nodalite runs on Node, Bun, Deno, Cloudflare Workers, and AWS Lambda with the same code. It includes built-in security, background threads, and ML inference that other frameworks lack.
